resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Family history, symptoms, clinical history, labs, imaging, medication context, clinician review, genetic counselor review, and disease-specific interpretation are unavailable in this fixture.
resultRows.sourceLabel: MedlinePlus genetic test results / NCI cancer genetic testing
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Disease-risk reports require validated test scope and personal clinical context. This local validation result should keep risk, screening, prevention, treatment, and actionability unavailable.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: The sample states that 'Your Risk' is only for the heritable component of the disease, and that environmental, lifestyle, and other non-heritable factors also affect overall susceptibility risk. The sample uses lung cancer as an example, saying lung cancer is only 10% heritable and most cases are associated with lifestyle factors such as smoking.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Observed public Disease Risk sample-report structure only. Keep this separate from local genome evidence; it is not a personal disease-risk estimate, diagnosis, screening recommendation, prevention plan, treatment guidance, all-clear reassurance, or actionability conclusion.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Visible sample rows include Bladder Very Elevated; Brain Typical; Breast Typical; Breast BRCA1 Absent; Breast BRCA2 Absent; Cervical Male; Colorectal Typical; Endometrial Male; Esophageal visible with no cleanly extracted risk label; Liver Typical; Lung Very Reduced; Oral and Larynx visible with no cleanly extracted risk label; Ovarian Male; Pancreatic Reduced; Prostate Typical; Renal Typical; Skin Melanoma Reduced; Skin Non-melanoma Reduced; Testicular Typical; Thyroid Very Reduced. The sample table uses columns for Disease, Your Risk, and Description, with lifetime-risk and heritable-percentage text below many disease names.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Observed public Disease Risk sample-report structure only. Keep this separate from local genome evidence; it is not a personal disease-risk estimate, diagnosis, screening recommendation, prevention plan, treatment guidance, all-clear reassurance, or actionability conclusion.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Visible sample rows include Alzheimer's Disease Reduced; Alzheimer's Disease Early Onset Unlikely; Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis Elevated; Dystonia Absent; Neuronal Ceroid Lipofuscinosis Absent; Parkinson's Disease Typical. The page includes an Alzheimer's explanation and explicitly reports sample APOE status as epsilon3/epsilon3.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Observed public Disease Risk sample-report structure only. Keep this separate from local genome evidence; it is not a personal disease-risk estimate, diagnosis, screening recommendation, prevention plan, treatment guidance, all-clear reassurance, or actionability conclusion.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Visible sample rows include Abdominal Aortic Aneurysm Reduced; Atherosclerosis Typical; Atrial Fibrillation Typical; Cardiovascular Disease Early Onset Very Reduced; COPD Typical; Coronary Artery Disease Typical; Intracranial Aneurysm Elevated; Mitral Valve Prolapse Typical; Myocardial Infarction Reduced; Stroke Elevated; Venous Thromboembolism Typical. The page explains that CAD has a genetic susceptibility component and names KL, NOS3, HSPD1, and CHD13 as example genes used across hundreds of variants.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Observed public Disease Risk sample-report structure only. Keep this separate from local genome evidence; it is not a personal disease-risk estimate, diagnosis, screening recommendation, prevention plan, treatment guidance, all-clear reassurance, or actionability conclusion.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Visible sample rows include Allergy/Hay Fever/Eczema Elevated; Ankylosing Spondylitis Typical; Asthma Reduced; Childhood-Onset Asthma Typical; Autoimmune Diseases Typical; Celiac Disease Reduced; Crohn's Disease Typical; Type-1 Diabetes Unlikely; Type-2 Diabetes Typical; Graves' Disease Typical; IBD Reduced; Multiple Sclerosis Very Reduced; Psoriasis Reduced; Rheumatoid Arthritis Very Reduced; Sarcoidosis Reduced; Lupus Reduced; Ulcerative Colitis Reduced. The page explains Type-2 Diabetes susceptibility and names PPARG, KCNJ11, and TCF7L2 as example diabetes-related genes.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Observed public Disease Risk sample-report structure only. Keep this separate from local genome evidence; it is not a personal disease-risk estimate, diagnosis, screening recommendation, prevention plan, treatment guidance, all-clear reassurance, or actionability conclusion.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Visible sample rows include Age-Related Macular Degeneration Reduced; Exfoliation Glaucoma Elevated; Fuchs' Corneal Dystrophy Elevated; Myopia Typical; Refractive Astigmatism shown without a clear risk label in the extracted text. The page explains Exfoliation Glaucoma and says the report looks at variants in LOXL1 and several other genes known to influence risk.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Observed public Disease Risk sample-report structure only. Keep this separate from local genome evidence; it is not a personal disease-risk estimate, diagnosis, screening recommendation, prevention plan, treatment guidance, all-clear reassurance, or actionability conclusion.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Visible sample rows label Endometriosis, Gestational Diabetes, Menarche Age, Menopause Age, Polycystic Ovary Syndrome, Pre-eclampsia, and Uterine Fibroids as Male in this sample output. The sample table preserves sex-inapplicable output labels in the Your Risk column rather than converting them into medical conclusions.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Observed public Disease Risk sample-report structure only. Keep this separate from local genome evidence; it is not a personal disease-risk estimate, diagnosis, screening recommendation, prevention plan, treatment guidance, all-clear reassurance, or actionability conclusion.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Visible sample rows include Anxiety Related Behaviors Elevated; ADHD Typical; Autism Spectrum Disorder Reduced; Bipolar Disorder Typical; Cluster Headaches Typical; Depression Elevated; Dyslexia Typical; Epilepsy Typical; Major Depressive Disorder Elevated; Narcolepsy Typical; OCD Reduced; Schizophrenia Elevated; Tourette's Syndrome Typical. The page explains that CACNA1C and CACNB2 help regulate calcium flow in brain cells and are among genes considered for several neuro-psychological diseases.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Observed public Disease Risk sample-report structure only. Keep this separate from local genome evidence; it is not a personal disease-risk estimate, diagnosis, screening recommendation, prevention plan, treatment guidance, all-clear reassurance, or actionability conclusion.

organSystemConditionContext.boundary: Educational disease-risk report structure and evidence-availability context only.

diseaseRiskContext: Use this output as sample-format replication and educational context, not as a personal disease-risk report.
Bring validated test results, family history, symptoms, clinical history, labs, imaging, and medications to a qualified clinician or genetic counselor for actual disease-risk interpretation.
Do not use sample-only risk labels to start, stop, or change screening, prevention, medication, diet, supplements, or treatment.

A sample report table or selected gene mention should not be used to diagnose disease, estimate personal risk, recommend screening, or guide treatment.
